prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年天津市综合类最低位次分别为15511→14110→13028→12966→13657，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准位次约13657名，较2024年小幅后移约691名。
2 .【招生计划】该校在天津市招生计划持续扩增：2021年329人、2022年338人、2023年343人、2024年369人、2025年375人；2026年计划440人，较2025年扩招65人（增幅约1 7.3%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第107位，近年排名稳定在100–110区 间，属中上游211院校；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第93位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现报 考关注度异常升温信号；第五轮学科评估中该校无A-及以上等级学科（数据未收录或未达A-），优势学科主要集中在电气工程、化学工程、材料科学等工科领域 ，学科精度在211院校中处于中等水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校工科特色高度契合；天津市2021–2025年考生总数持续增长（54025→71938），2026年预计约82000人（较2025年增长约14%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线本科批近年小幅上升（463→476），特殊 类型招生控制线略有波动（579→562），整体难度稳定；该校校址位于天津市，属于"异地办学"模式（河北属、天津办），在天津市本地招生占比相对较高，202 5年计划375人占该校在津招生主体，本地考生报考意愿稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+17.3%）与天津市考生总数显著增长（+14%）的叠加效 应，扩招幅度略大于考生增幅，使竞争压力略有缓解，但位次仍较2025年有所后移；结合学校声誉平稳、工科专业热度持续、地域偏好稳定等因素，预测2026年最低位次约14877 名，区间14377–15377名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14877名，区间14377–15377名。位次在区间下限（14377名）以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（电气、计算机、电子信息）；位次在区间中段（约14877名）建议以二档 专业为主（机械、数据科学、通信、会计等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（15377名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时关注芬兰校区中外合作专业作为低分高录的备选路径 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Tianjin comprehensive category were 15511 → 14110 → 13028 → 12966 → 13657, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13657, a slight decline of about 691 positions compared to 2024.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin has been continuously expanding: 329 in 2021, 338 in 2022, 343 in 2023, 369 in 2024, 375 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 440, an increase of 65 students (approximately 17.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will have an important impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 107th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 100–110 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps reported; Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a moderate level, showing no abnormal surge in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines (data not included or not reaching A-), with advantageous disciplines mainly in engineering fields such as electrical engineering, chemical engineering, and materials science, placing its disciplinary precision at a moderate level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science are highly popular and recommended, aligning well with the university's engineering focus. The total number of examinees in Tianjin from 2021 to 2025 has been continuously increasing (54025 → 71938), with an estimated 82,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 14% compared to 2025), intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. The provincial control line for undergraduate batches has slightly increased in recent years (463 → 476), while the special type enrollment control line has fluctuated slightly (579 → 562), indicating overall stable difficulty. The university is located in Tianjin, operating under an 'off-site schooling' model (belonging to Hebei, operating in Tianjin), with a relatively high proportion of local enrollment in Tianjin; the 2025 plan of 375 students constitutes the main body of enrollment in Tianjin, and local candidates' willingness to apply remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+17.3%), and the notable increase in the number of examinees in Tianjin (+14%), the expansion rate slightly exceeds the candidate growth rate, leading to a slight easing of competitive pressure, but rankings will still decline compared to 2025. Combined with the stable university reputation, sustained popularity of engineering majors, and stable regional preferences, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 14877, with a range of 14377–15377.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 14877, range 14377–15377. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (14377) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information); those with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 14877) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors (Mechanical, Data Science, Communication, Accounting, etc.) while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (15377) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering the Finland Campus Sino-foreign Cooperative Programs as an alternative path for lower scores to achieve higher enrollment.
